commands.review_summary:
The PR makes workspace bootstrap file reads async, replaces extra-bootstrap fs.glob expansion with a yielding walker, yields between agent bootstrap hook handlers, adds bootstrap-context timing instrumentation, and expands focused tests.

PR surface: Source +159, Tests +428. Total +587 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence full current-main embedded_run reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked issue has production liveness logs, and current-main source confirms the implicated sync read, fs.glob expansion, and sequential hook dispatch path inside bootstrap-context.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve fs.glob no-match semantics and add coverage; maintainers still own the final compatibility and availability tradeoff.
